mapper.select: SELECT FLOOR((DAYOFMONTH(work_date) - 1) / 7) + 1 AS week, IFNULL(SUM(hours), 0) AS hours FROM work_record WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND del_flag = 0 AND FLOOR((DAYOFMONTH(work_date) - 1) / 7) + 1 BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY week ORDER BY week

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, IFNULL(this_month.hours, 0) AS totalHours, CASE WHEN last_month.hours IS NULL OR last_month.hours = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((this_month.hours - last_month.hours) / last_month.hours * 100, 0) END AS trend FROM project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(hours) AS hours FROM work_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND del_flag = 0 GROUP BY project_id ) this_month ON p.id = this_month.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(hours) AS hours FROM work_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m') = #{lastMonth} AND del_flag = 0 GROUP BY project_id ) last_month ON p.id = last_month.project_id WHERE p.del_flag = 0 AND (this_month.hours IS NOT NULL OR last_month.hours IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY totalHours DESC LIMIT #{limit}
